# Campaign Change Log

2026-04-28: Weather contingency activated. Event date changed from May 14 to
May 21, 2026.

2026-05-02: Construction notice received. Location changed from Harbor Plaza to
Riverside Hall.

2026-05-05: Sponsor changed from North Pier Foods to GreenBridge Market.

2026-05-07: Theme updated from Lantern Tasting Walk to Makers and Music Night.
Use the new theme in all current public materials.
